text.title: Agency Kickoff Deck Template Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: First 20 slides are agency credentials; client checks out.
antipattern.root-cause: Sales deck recycled as kickoff deck.
antipattern.fix: Hard cap 12 slides; credentials sit elsewhere.

antipattern.symptom: Kickoff ends with 'we'll align async'; same questions re-emerge week 2.
antipattern.fix: Penultimate slide is numbered decision asks; meeting parks until each is answered.

antipattern.symptom: Workstream owner shown as a placeholder on client side; weeks pass without progress.
antipattern.fix: Brief explicitly captures client owner before deck is finalised.

antipattern.symptom: Client pings PM ad-hoc on email/Slack/SMS; PM hours burn on coordination.
antipattern.fix: Explicit slide; channel + frequency + owner agreed at kickoff.
